title: Error 404

body:
Error 404 Mod - Not Found? Not Anymore!

Welcome to the "Error 404 Mod," the mod that brings the unexpected to your Minecraft world! Ever wondered what happens when something goes missing in the code? We’ve captured the essence of the classic “Error 404” and transformed it into a mod full of quirky surprises and random chaos.

Features:

Mysterious Glitches: Random blocks might disappear, reappear, or even transform into something else entirely. Who needs stability anyway?
Unexpected Mobs: Encounter glitchy mobs that don’t behave as you’d expect. Some might be friendly, while others... not so much!
Random Events: Experience spontaneous events that defy the laws of Minecraft. Will it rain cats and dogs? Will the sun set in the east? You never know!
Glitched Items: Craft bizarre, unpredictable items that can either be incredibly powerful or utterly useless. It's a gamble every time!
404-Dimensions: Enter glitchy dimensions that are as confusing as they are dangerous. Are you brave enough to explore the unknown?

This mod is perfect for those who love the unexpected and enjoy a good laugh. Whether you're pranking your friends or just want to add a touch of chaos to your game, the "Error 404 Mod" is sure to keep you on your toes.

Warning: This mod may cause serious confusion, uncontrollable laughter, and a strong urge to shout "What just happened?!" Use at your own risk!
